---
name: Data error report
about: Report an incorrect value in one of the datasets
title: "[DATA] <dataset>: short description of the error"
labels: data-error
assignees: sadanandv
---

<!--
Thanks for helping improve fifa-worldcup-data.

Before filing: this database is derived from Wikipedia match reports, squad pages,
and tournament pages. Please open the relevant Wikipedia page and confirm the value
there disagrees with the data. If Wikipedia itself is wrong, this is not the right
place — the correction needs to happen upstream at Wikipedia first.

Original database © 2023 Joshua C. Fjelstul, Ph.D. | https://github.com/jfjelstul/worldcup
-->

### Dataset
<!-- e.g. matches, goals, players, var_interventions -->


### Tournament year affected
<!-- e.g. 2018, or 2023 (women's), or 2026 (men's) -->


### Row identifier
<!-- The primary key of the affected row(s): match_id, player_id, goal_id, etc.
     Give the exact id string(s) so the row can be located unambiguously. -->


### Current (incorrect) value
<!-- The value exactly as it appears in the data today, and the column it's in. -->


### Correct value + explanation
<!-- What the value should be, and why. -->


### Wikipedia source URL
<!-- The Wikipedia page that supports the correction. Required. -->


### Additional context (optional)
<!-- Anything else that helps: related rows, screenshots, conflicting sources, etc. -->
